pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Migrate javax.annotation-api to jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is removed from the default classpath in Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE 9+; using javax.* annotations will cause NoClassDefFoundError or compile errors if the artifact is missing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 and modern Maven.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not support Java 21 bytecode generation or may fail to parse newer language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in newer compiler plugins; using 'release' is required for correct module path and API level enforcement in Java 9+.

wire-di-annotations/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 in the module's POM to align with the target JDK.

wire-di-bootstrap/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version property from 1.8 to 21.
wire-di-bootstrap/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 21 APIs and language features; keeping 1.8 would result in compilation errors or missing features.

wire-di-bootstrap/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
wire-di-bootstrap/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the compiler plugin may not support compiling for Java 21 or may fail to recognize new language features.

wire-di-bootstrap/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release configuration in the compiler plugin.
wire-di-bootstrap/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' for cross-compilation and module path support in modern Java versions.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/pom.xm.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace removed javax.inject in Java 21 / Spring Boot 3 environment.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/pom.xm.why_exists: javax.inject classes are no longer available on the classpath in Java 21 / Spring Boot 3, causing NoClassDefFoundError or compile errors if code references them.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/pom.xm.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation in Java 21 / Spring Boot 3 environment.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/pom.xm.why_exists: javax.annotation classes (e.g., @Generated, @PostConstruct) are no longer available on the classpath in Java 21 / Spring Boot 3, causing NoClassDefFoundError or compile errors if code references them.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
Migrate instanceof check to use pattern matching syntax introduced in Java 16.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.before:
if (element instanceof TypeElement) {
            TypeElement typeElement = (TypeElement) element;

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Replace instanceof check with pattern matching to eliminate explicit cast.
Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.
Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.
Migrate instanceof check and cast to Java 16+ pattern matching syntax.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.after:
if(currentRoot instanceof PackageElement element) {
                    packageElement = element;

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(int) with List.getFirst() for cleaner code.
Replace legacy List.get(0) call with the Java 21 List.getFirst() convenience method.
Replace explicit cast with pattern matching instanceof to simplify code and leverage Java 16+ features.

wire-di-processor/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace the removed javax.inject API in Java 21.
wire-di-processor/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject classes are no longer available in the JDK or standard libraries in Java 21, causing compilation errors if the code references them without an explicit dependency.

wire-di-processor/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the removed javax.annotation API in Java 21.
wire-di-processor/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation classes (e.g., @Generated, @PostConstruct) are no longer available in the JDK or standard libraries in Java 21, causing compilation errors if the code references them without an explicit dependency.

wire-di-processor/src/main/java/com/gith.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for accessing the first element.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for accessing the first element.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
wire-di-processor/src/main/java/com/gith.why_exists: List.get(0) is not removed in Java 21, so this is not strictly breaking for compilation, but the intent is to adopt the new API. However, per rules, if it compiles on old JDK, it's polishment. Wait, the prompt says 'bucket=breaking ONLY if the migration won't compile or run on the target JDK without this change'. Since get(0) works on J21, this is polishment.

wire-di-runtime-environment/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace or supplement Java EE/older javax.inject annotations for Java 21 compatibility.
wire-di-runtime-environment/pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError if code uses jakarta.inject annotations but the API jar is missing from the classpath, especially after migrating from javax.inject in older Spring Boot/JDK versions.

wire-di-runtime-environment/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for modern Java 21 API usage.
